search_candidates.title: Investor & Governance
search_candidates.content: PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (the Company) is a leading fully integrated industry-based township developer in Indonesia, listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange. Jababeka’s core business is developing industry-based real estate, supported and enhanced by infrastructure and township management services. Jababeka’s business model is to develop industrial real estate sites in a manner which builds critical mass and allows the Company to offer and enhance complementary commercial and residential developments as well as infrastructure and estate management services; thereby creating an industry-based township. Jababeka is also developing an industry-based township in the Kendal Regency, Central Java, which is approximately 450 kilometers east of Jakarta. | KIJA - Pemanggilan RUPST 2026 | Download |. | KIJA Invitation AGM 2026 | Download |. | 2025 Ringksan RUPST Ketiga (Resume the 3rd AGM) | Download |. | 2025 Ringkasan Risalah RUPST (Bahasa & English) | Download |. | KIJA - AGM Announcement (bilingual) 2025 | Download |. | Invitation to the AGMS 2024 | Download |.

All publications on earnings for you at a glance. ## Annual and Sustainability Report 2025. In 2025, we were once again able to more than offset challenges in individual markets. Growth in infrastructure construction in the areas of mobility, energy and water, as well as in high-tech industrial construction, helped STRABAG achieve its best results to date. All details on our results and the most important events of the year 2025 can be found in our online Annual and Sustainability Report 2025. ### Results for the financial year | FY. ### Online Annual and Sustainability Report 2025. ### Initial figures 2025. #### Results Presentation Initial figures 2025. ### Initial Figures for the Financial Year I FY. #### Annual Financial Report FY 2020.

evidence.Annual-Report-2020_financial: consolidated statements of profit or loss and other perubahan ekuitas konsolidasian dan laporan arus kas comprehensive income, consolidated statements of changes konsolidasian untuk tahun yang berakhir pada tanggal in equity, and consolidated statements of cash flows for the 31 Desember 2020, dan suatu ikhtisar kebijakan akuntansi year ended December 31, 2020, and a summary of significant signifikan dan informasi penjelasan lainnya. accounting policies and other explanatory information. Tanggung jawab manajemen atas laporan keuangan Management’s responsibility for the financial statements Manajemen bertanggung jawab atas penyusunan dan Management is responsible for the preparation and fair penyajian wajar laporan keuangan konsolidasian tersebut presentation of such consolidated financial statements in sesuai dengan Standar Akuntansi Keuangan di Indonesia, dan accordance with Indonesian Financial Accounting Standards, atas pengendalian internal yang dianggap perlu oleh and for such internal control as management determines is manajemen untuk memungkinkan penyusunan laporan necessary to enable the preparation of consolidated financial keuangan konsolidasian yang bebas dari kesalahan penyajian statements that are free from material misstatement, whether material, baik yang disebabkan oleh kecurangan maupun due to fraud or error. kesalahan. Tanggung jawab auditor Auditors’ responsibility Tanggung jawab kami adalah untuk menyatakan suatu opini Our responsibility is to express an opinion on such atas laporan keuangan konsolidasian tersebut berdasarkan consolidated financial statements based on our audit. We audit kami. Kami melaksanakan audit kami berdasarkan conducted our audit in accordance with Standards on Auditing Standar Audit yang ditetapkan oleh Institut Akuntan Publik established by the Indonesian Institute of Certified Public Indonesia. Standar tersebut mengharuskan kami untuk Accountants. Those standards require that we comply with mematuhi ketentuan etika serta merencanakan dan ethical requirements and plan and perform the audit to obtain melaksanakan audit untuk memperoleh keyakinan memadai reasonable assurance about whether such consolidated tentang apakah laporan keuangan konsolidasian tersebut financial statements are free from material misstatement. bebas dari kesalahan penyajian material. Suatu audit melibatkan pelaksanaan prosedur untuk An audit involves performing procedures to obtain audit memperoleh bukti audit tentang angka-angka dan evidence about the amounts and disclosures in the pengungkapan dalam laporan keuangan konsolidasian. consolidated financial statements. The procedures selected Prosedur yang dipilih bergantung pada pertimbangan auditor, depend on the auditors’ judgment, including the assessment of termasuk penilaian atas risiko kesalahan penyajian material the risks of material misstatement of the consolidated financial dalam laporan keuangan konsolidasian, baik yang disebabkan statements, whether due to fraud or error. In making those risk oleh kecurangan maupun kesalahan. Dalam melakukan assessments, the auditors consider internal control relevant to penilaian risiko tersebut, auditor mempertimbangkan the entity’s preparation and fair presentation of the pengendalian internal yang relevan dengan penyusunan dan consolidated financial statements in order to design audit penyajian wajar laporan keuangan konsolidasian untuk procedures that are appropriate in the circumstances, but not merancang prosedur audit yang tepat sesuai dengan for the purpose of expressing an opinion on the effectiveness kondisinya, tetapi bukan untuk tujuan menyatakan opini atas of the group’s internal control. An audit also includes keefektivitasan pengendalian internal grup.
